item.title: Can You Guess These Beauty Eras?
item.description: Jaime French invites viewers to guess which beauty eras are being shown in this fun, style-focused video.

item.title: Jaime French on J.Lo’s Self-Investment
item.description: Jaime French shares a light take on J.Lo’s self-investment and whether it was worth it.
